context: Tests whether the agent produces a complete set of planning artifacts from a feature spec: structured technical context, technology decisions with rationale, data model with state transitions, API contracts traceable to requirements, and spec quality assessment before planning.

checklist.name: plan.md exists
checklist.description: A plan.md file is created at specs/001-notification-service/plan.md

checklist.name: Technical Context fields
checklist.description: plan.md contains a Technical Context section with all required fields filled in: Language/Version, Primary Dependencies, Storage, Testing, Target Platform, Project Type, Performance Goals, Constraints, Scale/Scope — none left as empty or placeholder-only

checklist.name: No bare Option labels
checklist.description: plan.md does NOT contain 'Option 1:', 'Option 2:', 'Option 3:' labels or '[REMOVE IF UNUSED]' markers from the template

checklist.name: research.md with rationale
checklist.description: research.md exists and contains at least one technology decision with explicit rationale and at least one alternative considered

checklist.name: data-model.md entities
checklist.description: data-model.md exists and defines at least two entities (e.g., Notification, Channel, RetryPolicy) with their fields listed

checklist.name: State transitions in data-model
checklist.description: data-model.md includes the notification status state machine or state transitions (queued → sending → delivered/failed)

checklist.name: contracts/ directory
checklist.description: At least one API contract file exists in specs/001-notification-service/contracts/

checklist.name: Contracts reference spec requirements
checklist.description: The API contract(s) reference specific functional requirements by identifier (FR-XXX) or clearly trace to individual requirements from the spec

checklist.name: quickstart.md exists with scenarios
checklist.description: quickstart.md exists and contains specific test scenarios or example commands for exercising the notification feature (not just generic instructions)

checklist.name: No governance content in plan
checklist.description: plan.md does NOT contain project-wide principles, non-negotiable rules applying to all features, or team workflow/process requirements — governance content belongs in CONSTITUTION.md

checklist.name: Spec quality assessment performed
checklist.description: The agent assessed the spec quality before planning: checked FR count, flagged any missing measurable criteria, identified unresolved clarifications, and reported a quality score or summary

checklist.name: Plan decisions trace to spec FRs
checklist.description: plan.md or research.md references specific FR-XXX identifiers from the spec when justifying technical decisions (e.g., choosing a message queue to satisfy FR-003 about retry policies)

checklist.name: context.json updated
checklist.description: .specify/context.json is updated with plan-related data (e.g., architecture node classifications, eval scores, or other dashboard metadata) without overwriting existing fields
